subcodes.first_line: O thou my heavenly son: Thy letter was received. It was a rose-garden from which the sweet fragrances of the love of God were inhaled.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پسر ملکوتی من نامه تو رسید گلستانی بود که روائح طیبه محبت الله از آن منتشر
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritual transformation, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
